firstlibflorian 0.1.0

  • Articles
  • References

French Demographic Analysis - R Package

This R package provides tools for structural demographic and geographic analysis.

Package Documentation (Online)

рџЋЇ Overview

This project provides tools for demographic and geographic data analysis of French communes and departments.

Objectives - Construct custom classes for communes and departments - Automate demographic and statistical reporting via Quarto - Generate visualizations using ggplot2 - Ensure reproducible and documented workflows

рџ—„пёЏ Data

  • Data Availability: Packaged dataset provided in data/

вљ™пёЏ Features

  • Create Custom Classes: Represent communes and departments via S3 structured objects
  • Summarize Statistical Metrics: Compute demographic metrics at regional levels
  • Visualize Population Data: Display commune and department data graphically
  • Automate Quarto Reporting: Generate interactive analytical reports
  • Publish Package Documentation: Deploy reference materials using pkgdown
  • Integrate Rmd Vignettes: Support instructional demonstrations directly within Quarto

рџ§° Tech Stack

  • Language: R (>= 4.1.0)
  • Numerical Computing & Data Manipulation: dplyr, tibble, stringr, lubridate, purrr
  • Data Visualization: ggplot2, cowplot
  • Code Quality & Testing: devtools, usethis, testthat
  • Reporting & Documentation: Quarto, pkgdown, roxygen2, knitr, rmarkdown

рџ“¦ Installation 

install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("floriancrochet/master-year1-advanced-r-and-github")

рџ’» Usage Example

Reproducing the Analysis / Execution Pipeline

(Expected runtime: ~20 seconds on AMD Ryzen 7)

library(firstlibflorian)

data("df_gers_loire_atlantique")
generer_rapport("44109", "44", "path/to/output.html", df_gers_loire_atlantique)

рџ“‚ Project Structure 

firstlibflorian/
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ .github/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ workflows/
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ pkgdown.yaml
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ .gitignore
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ R/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ calcul_distribution_age.R             # Demographic distribution computation
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ compter_nombre_d_adjoints.R           # Demographic aggregation counting
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ compter_nombre_d_elus.R               # Demographic aggregation counting
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ creer_commune.R                       # S3 object constructor
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ creer_departement.R                   # S3 object constructor
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ data.R                                # Base schema definition
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ generer_rapport.R                     # Quarto report orchestrator
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ plot.commune.R                        # Custom S3 visualization method
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ plot.departement.R                    # Custom S3 visualization method
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ plot_code_professions.R               # Custom S3 visualization method
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ summary.commune.R                     # Statistical summary method
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ summary.departement.R                 # Statistical summary method
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ trouver_elu_le_plus_age_jeune.R       # Demographic extrema identification
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ trouver_l_elu_le_plus_age.R           # Demographic extrema identification
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ trouver_moyenne_age_faible_elevee.R   # Demographic mean optimization
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ valider_schema.R                      # S3 class validator
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ zzz.R                                 # Startup sequence
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ data/
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ df_gers_loire_atlantique.rda
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ inst/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ .gitignore
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ rapport.qmd                           # Analytical report template
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ man/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ calcul_distribution_age.Rd
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ compter_nombre_d_adjoints.Rd
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ compter_nombre_d_elus.Rd
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ creer_commune.Rd
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ creer_departement.Rd
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ df_gers_loire_atlantique.Rd
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ generer_rapport.Rd
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ plot.commune.Rd
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ plot.departement.Rd
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ plot_code_professions.Rd
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ summary.commune.Rd
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ summary.departement.Rd
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ trouver_elu_le_plus_age_jeune.Rd
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ trouver_l_elu_le_plus_age.Rd
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ trouver_moyenne_age_faible_elevee.Rd
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ valider_schema.Rd
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ pkgdown/
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ style.css
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ tests/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ testthat/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ test-calcul_distribution_age.R
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ test-compter_nombre_d_adjoints.R
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ test-compter_nombre_d_elus.R
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ test-creer_commune.R
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ test-creer_departement.R
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ test-generer_rapport.R
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ test-plot.commune.R
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ test-plot.departement.R
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ test-plot_code_professions.R
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ test-summary.commune.R
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ test-summary.departement.R
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ test-trouver_elu_le_plus_age_jeune.R
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ test-trouver_l_elu_le_plus_age.R
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ test-trouver_moyenne_age_faible_elevee.R
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ test-valider_schema.R
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ testthat.R
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ vignettes/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ .gitignore
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ description.qmd                       # Structural overview
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ firstlibFlorian.qmd                   # Core tutorial
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ fonctions.qmd                         # API documentation
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ .Rbuildignore
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ .gitignore
